ayahs.arabic: كٓهيعٓصٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaf-ha-ya-AAayn-sad
ayahs.translation: Kāf, Hā, Yā, ʿAyn, Ṣād.[806]

ayahs.arabic: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ
ayahs.transliteration: Thikru rahmati rabbika AAabdahuzakariyya
ayahs.translation: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ith nada rabbahu nidaankhafiyya
ayahs.translation: When he called to his Lord a private call [i.e., supplication].

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee wahana alAAathmuminnee washtaAAala arra/su shayban walam akunbiduAAa-ika rabbi shaqiyya
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled[807] with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy [i.e., disappointed].

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى خِفْتُ ٱلْمَوَٰلِىَ مِن وَرَآءِى وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا فَهَبْ لِى مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innee khiftu almawaliya min wara-eewakanati imraatee AAaqiran fahab lee min ladunkawaliyya
ayahs.translation: And indeed, I fear the successors[808] after me, and my wife has been barren, so give me from Yourself an heir

ayahs.arabic: يَرِثُنِى وَيَرِثُ مِنْ ءَالِ يَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَٱجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Yarithunee wayarithu min ali yaAAqoobawajAAalhu rabbi radiyya
ayahs.translation: Who will inherit me[809] and inherit from the family of Jacob. And make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You]."

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya zakariyya innanubashshiruka bighulamin ismuhu yahya lamnajAAal lahu min qablu samiyya
ayahs.translation: [He was told],[810] "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ ٱلْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi anna yakoonu leeghulamun wakanati imraatee AAaqiran waqadbalaghtu mina alkibari AAitiyya
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kathalika qalarabbuka huwa AAalayya hayyinun waqad khalaqtuka min qablu walamtaku shay-a
ayahs.translation: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.'"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً ۚ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَـٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi ijAAal lee ayatan qalaayatuka alla tukallima annasa thalathalayalin sawiyya
ayahs.translation: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."[811]

ayahs.arabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakharaja AAala qawmihi mina almihrabifaawha ilayhim an sabbihoo bukratan waAAashiyya
ayahs.translation: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya yahya khuthialkitaba biquwwatin waataynahu alhukmasabiyya
ayahs.translation: [Allāh said], "O John, take the Scripture [i.e., adhere to it] with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy

ayahs.arabic: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wahananan min ladunnawazakatan wakana taqiyya
ayahs.translation: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allāh

ayahs.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wabarran biwalidayhi walam yakun jabbaranAAasiyya
ayahs.translation: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.

ayahs.arabic: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wasalamun AAalayhi yawma wulidawayawma yamootu wayawma yubAAathu hayya
ayahs.translation: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fee alkitabimaryama ithi intabathat min ahliha makanansharqiyya
ayahs.translation: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fattakhathat min doonihim hijabanfaarsalna ilayha roohanafatamaththala laha basharan sawiyya
ayahs.translation: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qalat innee aAAoothu birrahmaniminka in kunta taqiyya
ayahs.translation: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَـٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala innama ana rasoolurabbiki li-ahaba laki ghulaman zakiyya
ayahs.translation: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qalat anna yakoonu lee ghulamunwalam yamsasnee basharun walam aku baghiyya
ayahs.translation: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kathaliki qalarabbuki huwa AAalayya hayyinun walinajAAalahu ayatan linnasiwarahmatan minna wakana amran maqdiyya
ayahs.translation: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'"

ayahs.arabic: ۞ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتْ بِهِۦ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fahamalat-hu fantabathatbihi makanan qasiyya
ayahs.translation: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَـٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faajaaha almakhadu ilajithAAi annakhlati qalat ya laytaneemittu qabla hatha wakuntu nasyan mansiyya
ayahs.translation: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten."

ayahs.arabic: فَنَادَىٰهَا مِن تَحْتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحْزَنِى قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fanadaha min tahtihaalla tahzanee qad jaAAala rabbuki tahtakisariyya
ayahs.translation: But he[812] called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُزِّىٓ إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ تُسَـٰقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuzzee ilayki bijithAAi annakhlatitusaqit AAalayki rutaban janiyya
ayahs.translation: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.

ayahs.arabic: فَكُلِى وَٱشْرَبِى وَقَرِّى عَيْنًا ۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِىٓ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakulee washrabee waqarree AAaynanfa-imma tarayinna mina albashari ahadan faqooleeinnee nathartu lirrahmani sawmanfalan okallima alyawma insiyya
ayahs.translation: So eat and drink and be contented. And if you see from among humanity anyone, say, 'Indeed, I have vowed to the Most Merciful abstention, so I will not speak today to [any] man.'"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ ۖ قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْـًٔا فَرِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faatat bihi qawmaha tahmiluhuqaloo ya maryamu laqad ji/ti shay-an fariyya
ayahs.translation: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأُخْتَ هَـٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya okhta haroona ma kanaabooki imraa saw-in wama kanat ommuki baghiyya
ayahs.translation: O sister [i.e., descendant] of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ ۖ قَالُوا۟ كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faasharat ilayhi qaloo kayfanukallimu man kana fee almahdi sabiyya
ayahs.translation: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنِّى عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِىَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِى نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala innee AAabdu Allahi ataniyaalkitaba wajaAAalanee nabiyya
ayahs.translation: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allāh. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَـٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalanee mubarakan aynamakuntu waawsanee bissalati wazzakatima dumtu hayya
ayahs.translation: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakāh as long as I remain alive

ayahs.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَتِى وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wabarran biwalidatee walam yajAAalneejabbaran shaqiyya
ayahs.translation: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wassalamu AAalayya yawmawulidtu wayawma amootu wayawma obAAathu hayya
ayahs.translation: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive."

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ ۚ قَوْلَ ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thalika AAeesa ibnu maryamaqawla alhaqqi allathee feehi yamtaroon
ayahs.translation: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.

ayahs.arabic: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ ۖ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥٓ ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma kana lillahi anyattakhitha min waladin subhanahu itha qadaamran fa-innama yaqoolu lahu kun fayakoon
ayahs.translation: It is not [befitting] for Allāh to take a son; exalted is He![813] When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna Allaha rabbee warabbukum faAAbudoohuhatha siratun mustaqeem
ayahs.translation: [Jesus said], "And indeed, Allāh is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is a straight path."

ayahs.arabic: فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ مِنۢ بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن مَّشْهَدِ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakhtalafa al-ahzabumin baynihim fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min mashhadiyawmin AAatheem
ayahs.translation: Then the factions differed [concerning Jesus] from among them, so woe to those who disbelieved - from the scene of a tremendous Day.

ayahs.arabic: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا ۖ لَـٰكِنِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AsmiAA bihim waabsir yawma ya/toonanalakini aththalimoona alyawmafee dalalin mubeen
ayahs.translation: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waanthirhum yawma alhasrati ithqudiya al-amru wahum fee ghaflatin wahum layu/minoon
ayahs.translation: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded;[814] and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu narithu al-ardawaman AAalayha wa-ilayna yurjaAAoon
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fee alkitabiibraheema innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyya
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنكَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala li-abeehi yaabati lima taAAbudu ma la yasmaAAu wala yubsiruwala yughnee AAanka shay-a
ayahs.translation: [Mention] when he said to his father, "O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all?

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati innee qad jaanee minaalAAilmi ma lam ya/tika fattabiAAnee ahdika siratansawiyya
ayahs.translation: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati la taAAbudi ashshaytanainna ashshaytana kana lirrahmaniAAasiyya
ayahs.translation: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطَـٰنِ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati innee akhafu anyamassaka AAathabun mina arrahmanifatakoona lishshyatani waliyya
ayahs.translation: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ ۖ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala araghibun anta AAan alihateeya ibraheemu la-in lam tantahi laarjumannaka wahjurneemaliyya
ayahs.translation: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala salamun AAalaykasaastaghfiru laka rabbee innahu kana bee hafiyya
ayahs.translation: [Abraham] said, "Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you.[815] I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WaaAAtazilukum wama tadAAoona mindooni Allahi waadAAoo rabbee AAasa allaakoona biduAAa-i rabbee shaqiyya
ayahs.translation: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke[816] my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma iAAtazalahum wamayaAAbudoona min dooni Allahi wahabna lahu ishaqawayaAAqooba wakullan jaAAalna nabiyya
ayahs.translation: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wawahabna lahum min rahmatinawajaAAalna lahum lisana sidqin AAaliyya
ayahs.translation: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fee alkitabimoosa innahu kana mukhlasan wakanarasoolan nabiyya
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.[817]

ayahs.arabic: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَـٰهُ نَجِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanadaynahu min janibiattoori al-aymani waqarrabnahu najiyya
ayahs.translation: And We called him from the side of the mount[818] at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].

ayahs.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wawahabna lahu min rahmatinaakhahu haroona nabiyya
ayahs.translation: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fee alkitabiismaAAeela innahu kana sadiqa alwaAAdi wakanarasoolan nabiyya
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakana ya/muru ahlahu bissalatiwazzakati wakana AAinda rabbihi mardiyya
ayahs.translation: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fee alkitabiidreesa innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyya
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

ayahs.arabic: وَرَفَعْنَـٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WarafaAAnahu makanan AAaliyya
ayahs.translation: And We raised him to a high station.

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ ۚ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا ۩
ayahs.transliteration: Ola-ika allatheena anAAama AllahuAAalayhim mina annabiyyeena min thurriyyati adamawamimman hamalna maAAa noohin wamin thurriyyatiibraheema wa-isra-eela wamimman hadayna wajtabaynaitha tutla AAalayhim ayatu arrahmanikharroo sujjadan wabukiyya
ayahs.translation: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَوَٰتِ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakhalafa min baAAdihim khalfun adaAAooassalata wattabaAAoo ashshahawatifasawfa yalqawna ghayya
ayahs.translation: But there came after them successors [i.e., later generations] who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil[819] -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man taba waamanawaAAamila salihan faola-ika yadkhuloonaaljannata wala yuthlamoona shay-a
ayahs.translation: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.

ayahs.arabic: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Jannati AAadnin allatee waAAada arrahmanuAAibadahu bighaybi innahu kana waAAduhuma/tiyya
ayahs.translation: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been eminent.[820]

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَـٰمًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwanilla salaman walahum rizquhum feeha bukratanwaAAashiyya
ayahs.translation: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.

ayahs.arabic: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Tilka aljannatu allatee noorithu min AAibadinaman kana taqiyya
ayahs.translation: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allāh.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama natanazzalu illa bi-amrirabbika lahu ma bayna aydeena wama khalfanawama bayna thalika wama kana rabbukanasiyya
ayahs.translation: [Gabriel said],[821] "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -

ayahs.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَـٰدَتِهِۦ ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbu assamawati wal-ardiwama baynahuma faAAbudhu wastabirliAAibadatihi hal taAAlamu lahu samiyya
ayahs.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqoolu al-insanu a-itha mamittu lasawfa okhraju hayya
ayahs.translation: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Awa la yathkuru al-insanuanna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shay-a
ayahs.translation: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum washshayateenathumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyya
ayahs.translation: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.[822]

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatinayyuhum ashaddu AAala arrahmaniAAitiyya
ayahs.translation: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu billatheenahum awla biha siliyya
ayahs.translation: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-in minkum illa wariduhakana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyya
ayahs.translation: And there is none of you except he will come to it.[823] This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqawwanatharu aththalimeena feehajithiyya
ayahs.translation: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا بَيِّنَـٰتٍ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَىُّ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-itha tutla AAalayhim ayatunabayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheenaamanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanunadiyya
ayahs.translation: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association?"[824]

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثَـٰثًا وَرِءْيًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin humahsanu athathan wari/ya
ayahs.translation: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلضَّلَـٰلَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مَدًّا ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man kana fee addalalatifalyamdud lahu arrahmanu maddan hattaitha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathabawa-imma assaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwasharrun makanan waadAAafu junda
ayahs.translation: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers."

ayahs.arabic: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟ هُدًى ۗ وَٱلْبَـٰقِيَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheenaihtadaw hudan walbaqiyatu assalihatukhayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maradda
ayahs.translation: And Allāh increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord[825] for reward and better for recourse.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Afaraayta allathee kafara bi-ayatinawaqala laootayanna malan wawalada
ayahs.translation: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]"?

ayahs.arabic: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلْغَيْبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhathaAAinda arrahmani AAahda
ayahs.translation: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ مَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqooluwanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi madda
ayahs.translation: No! We will record what he says and extend [i.e., increase] for him from the punishment extensively.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanarithuhu ma yaqoolu waya/teenafarda
ayahs.translation: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions,[826] and he will come to Us alone.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمْ عِزًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wattakhathoo min dooni Allahialihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizza
ayahs.translation: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihimwayakoonoona AAalayhim didda
ayahs.translation: No! They [i.e., those "gods"] will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement].

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara anna arsalna ashshayateenaAAala alkafireena taozzuhum azza
ayahs.translation: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them [to evil] with [constant] incitement?

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innamanaAAuddu lahum AAadda
ayahs.translation: So be not impatient over them. We only count out [i.e., allow] to them a [limited] number.[827]

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَفْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ilaarrahmani wafda
ayahs.translation: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation

ayahs.arabic: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanasooqu almujrimeena ila jahannamawirda
ayahs.translation: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: La yamlikoona ashshafaAAatailla mani ittakhatha AAinda arrahmaniAAahda
ayahs.translation: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.[828]

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ittakhatha arrahmanuwalada
ayahs.translation: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son."

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad ji/tum shay-an idda
ayahs.translation: You have done an atrocious thing.

ayahs.arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Takadu assamawatuyatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu al-ardu watakhirrualjibalu hadda
ayahs.translation: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

ayahs.arabic: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: An daAAaw lirrahmaniwalada
ayahs.translation: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yanbaghee lirrahmanian yattakhitha walada
ayahs.translation: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.

ayahs.arabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: In kullu man fee assamawatiwal-ardi illa atee arrahmaniAAabda
ayahs.translation: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad ahsahum waAAaddahum AAadda
ayahs.translation: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakulluhum ateehi yawma alqiyamatifarda
ayahs.translation: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati sayajAAalu lahumu arrahmanuwudda
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.[829]

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-innama yassarnahu bilisanikalitubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawmanludda
ayahs.translation: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin haltuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikza
ayahs.translation: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?
